name: Hexalert
short_description: Scifi strategy game combining turnbased strategy and tower defence Upgrade and customize your own mechs to adapt in an ever changing world!
detailed_description:
Base Defence

Stategically place your units and fire their weapons to destroy enemies before they destroy your base

Defend your Headquarters from enemies to unlock new equipment & upgrades!

Unlock & upgrade

Equip your units with new equipment to better counter your enemies defences

Upgrade your equipment to improve your chances at clearing harder missions!

Changing battleground

Hexalert combines turnbased strategy and tower defence genres with a new twist!

The battleground changes every turn forcing you to adapt to new enemy attack paths to your base

Procedural battleground generation guarantees no two missions are the same!
